name: project-protocol
description: Project session discipline plugin: three-folder layout (cowork/agents/human) + root CLAUDE.md as the always-loaded brain (skill index, hooks index, situation router, non-negotiable rules). 16 skills (incl. migrate-project version-delta applier, build-page, build-component, marketing-brief, design-direction, design-check w/ auto-fix, edit-plugin), 9 hook events (incl. PostToolUse design-scan + design-check dispatcher, SessionStart drift-detector). Per-release migration manifests under migrations/. Three-layer architecture: Rules (CLAUDE.md) / Enforcement (hooks) / Workflow (skills). agentskills.io-conformant — Claude Code + Codex.
